subcodes.title: Words to Ethel Rosenberg, spoken on 1904-04-30
subcodes.first_line: this was not rightly expressed. It is not meant that after physical death those who are dead spiritually will cease to exist... We need not understand in their literal sense the descriptions of hell fire
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
